prompt: Create a polished anime-style close-up portrait of a cheerful young woman at a sunny seaside ice cream shop, holding a large mint chocolate chip waffle cone near her mouth as if about to taste it. She has warm chestnut brown hair tied in a messy high bun with loose wispy strands and a pastel aqua bow, bright blue-green eyes, soft flushed cheeks, glossy lips, and a delighted open smile. Her outfit is a mint-aqua summer camisole dress with thin straps, ruffled neckline, translucent off-shoulder sleeves, and tiny chocolate-chip-like dot accents, paired with matching turquoise nail polish. Include exactly 3 visible accessories: one mint ice-cream-cone dangling earring, one delicate gold necklace with a small turquoise pendant, and one aqua hair bow. The ice cream cone should have exactly 3 stacked scoops of mint chip ice cream, dark chocolate drizzle, colorful sprinkles, and one small square chocolate piece stuck into the top scoop. Set the scene in warm golden-hour light with a soft turquoise-and-cream beach café background, blurred umbrellas and shop details, shallow depth of field, sparkling highlights, dreamy bokeh, and a fresh summer atmosphere. Use high-detail digital illustration, semi-realistic anime rendering, luminous skin, detailed hair strands, crisp eyes, vibrant pastel color palette, portrait orientation, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
promptEn: Create a polished anime-style close-up portrait of a cheerful young woman at a sunny seaside ice cream shop, holding a large mint chocolate chip waffle cone near her mouth as if about to taste it. She has warm chestnut brown hair tied in a messy high bun with loose wispy strands and a pastel aqua bow, bright blue-green eyes, soft flushed cheeks, glossy lips, and a delighted open smile. Her outfit is a mint-aqua summer camisole dress with thin straps, ruffled neckline, translucent off-shoulder sleeves, and tiny chocolate-chip-like dot accents, paired with matching turquoise nail polish. Include exactly 3 visible accessories: one mint ice-cream-cone dangling earring, one delicate gold necklace with a small turquoise pendant, and one aqua hair bow. The ice cream cone should have exactly 3 stacked scoops of mint chip ice cream, dark chocolate drizzle, colorful sprinkles, and one small square chocolate piece stuck into the top scoop. Set the scene in warm golden-hour light with a soft turquoise-and-cream beach café background, blurred umbrellas and shop details, shallow depth of field, sparkling highlights, dreamy bokeh, and a fresh summer atmosphere. Use high-detail digital illustration, semi-realistic anime rendering, luminous skin, detailed hair strands, crisp eyes, vibrant pastel color palette, portrait orientation, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
promptZh: 创作一张精致的动漫风格特写肖像，描绘一位开朗的年轻女性在阳光明媚的海边冰淇淋店，手里拿着一个巨大的薄荷巧克力华夫饼甜筒放在嘴边，仿佛正要品尝。她留着 暖栗棕色 的头发，扎成凌乱的高丸子头，有几缕松散的发丝和一个淡水蓝色蝴蝶结，有着明亮的蓝绿色眼睛、红润的脸颊、水润的双唇和愉悦的笑容。她身穿一件薄荷水蓝色的夏日吊带裙，带有细肩带、荷叶边领口、半透明露肩袖，并饰有微小的巧克力豆状圆点，搭配同色系的绿松石色指甲油。画面中需包含 3 个清晰可见的配饰：一个薄荷冰淇淋甜筒吊坠耳环、一条带有小绿松石吊坠的精致金项链，以及一个水蓝色发结。冰淇淋甜筒应有 3 个堆叠的薄荷巧克力冰淇淋球、黑巧克力淋酱、彩色糖针，并在最顶部的冰淇淋球上插有一块小方形巧克力。场景设定在温暖的黄金时刻光线下，背景为柔和的绿松石色与奶油色调的海滩咖啡馆，带有模糊的遮阳伞和店铺细节、浅景深、闪烁的高光、梦幻的焦外成像，营造出清新的夏日氛围。采用高细节数字插画、半写实动漫渲染、透亮肌肤、细腻发丝、清晰的眼睛、鲜艳的柔和色调，肖像构图，无文字，无水印，无额外角色。
